name: repoarena
description: Open-source benchmark and replay tool for comparing AI coding agents in real repositories.

scripts.demo: pnpm build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run --repo . --task examples/taskpacks/demo-repo-health.json --agents demo-fast,demo-thorough,demo-budget
scripts.demo:codex: pnpm build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run --repo . --task examples/taskpacks/demo-repo-health.json --agents codex
scripts.demo:arena: pnpm build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run --repo . --task examples/taskpacks/demo-repo-health.json --agents demo-fast,codex,claude-code,cursor
scripts.doctor: pnpm build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js doctor --agents codex,claude-code,cursor,demo-fast --probe-auth
